creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to gja822 from comment #3)
If you no longer know how to reproduce the failure, then close your bug, please.

I don't see any changes in the ports tree in the past couple days that are related to gtk3, for what it's worth - no changes to the port itself, no relevant changes to any Mk/ files.
